---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for this project.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
signatures: ""
---

**Is your suggestion related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex: "I get frustrated when..."

**Feature Description**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**How ​​would this help users?**
Explain why this feature would be useful to the community.

**Alternatives Considered**
A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or drafts about the feature request here.
